tooltips.powerSpikes: Win Rate based on game duration. Shows if you are better in Early, Mid, or Late game.

vision.title: Improve Vision Control
vision.desc: Your ward count is low. Make it a habit to place wards before recalling.

farming.title: Improve CS Accuracy
farming.desc: You're missing minions. Practice last-hitting in practice tool.

survival.title: Reduce Deaths
survival.desc: Your death count is high. Check the minimap before engaging.

objective.title: Participate in Objectives
objective.desc: Your objective contribution is low. Join Dragon and Baron fights.

macro.title: Macro Improvement
macro.desc: This was highlighted by AI Coach analysis. Focus on improving this area.

micro.title: Mechanics Improvement
micro.desc: There's room to improve your trading and skill accuracy.

mental.title: Mental Reset
mental.desc: You're on a losing streak. Take a break or play normals to refresh.

winCondition.what: Win rate for 3 key actions: First Blood, First Tower, Solo Kill.
winCondition.why: High win rate on these = your 'win pattern'. Focus on what you're good at.
winCondition.how: Target 60%+ win rate on these conditions to stabilize your overall win rate.

laningPhase.what: Evaluates your early game CS advantage and farming power in the first 10 minutes.
laningPhase.why: Out-farming your opponent is the most reliable way to build an item lead.
laningPhase.how: Aim for +10 CS lead over your lane opponent consistently.

nemesis.what: Champions you struggle against (Nemesis) vs champions you dominate (Prey).
nemesis.why: Useful for ban decisions and counter-pick strategies.
nemesis.how: Consider banning Nemesis champions instead of fighting them head-on.

clutch.what: Win rate in close games (<5k gold diff) and stomp games (>10k gold diff).
clutch.why: Close game win rate shows decision-making under pressure.
clutch.how: Aim for 50%+ close game win rate to consistently secure winnable games.

principle1.title: Gold = Power
principle1.description: LoL is a game where you earn gold, buy items, and become stronger. Even with the same champion, a gold difference creates an overwhelming power gap.

principle2.title: Every Action Has Value
principle2.description: Kills, CS, objectives... everything can be converted to gold. Gold efficiency is the criteria for deciding 'What should I do now?'

comparison.title: Value Benchmarks
comparison.killEqualsCsDesc: One kill is worth about 300g. That's equivalent to 15 minions.
comparison.plateEqualsWavesDesc: One tower plate is 175g. That's equivalent to 3 minion waves.
comparison.dragonEqualsKillDesc: Dragon value is a % buff. The effect increases as you get more items.

market.title: Gold Reference
market.description: A complete list of base gold values for all units and objectives on Summoner's Rift. Learn what you earn from each target.
market.growthTooltip: Gold value increases over time (+{growth}g every 90 seconds). Worth more in late game.

scalingDragon.title: The Power of Multiplication
scalingDragon.description: Dragon buffs enhance stats by percentage (%). This means they're weak early when you have few items, but their value skyrockets as you build more items.
scalingDragon.note: Think of it as a 'multiplier' that amplifies your team's final power, not just flat gold.

scalingFixed.title: Fixed Value (No Scaling)
scalingFixed.description: This objective's value is constant regardless of game time. The gold and buff effects are fixed, with no variation based on timing. The earlier you secure it, the longer you can leverage the advantage.

detail.defaultHow: Establish vision (wards) and start the objective when your laners have priority (pushed lanes). Always keep track of your Smite damage.
detail.defaultWhy: Securing this objective gives your entire team a stat advantage beyond the gold difference. The effect becomes more significant as the game progresses.

errorBoundary.title: An Error Occurred
errorBoundary.description: Something went wrong while loading the page. Please try again or return to the dashboard.
errorBoundary.descriptionGeneric: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
errorBoundary.statsDescription: An error occurred while fetching stats. Please try again.

bento.aiChatPreview: The enemy Yasuo has a strong Lv2 power spike. Focus on wave control.

features.label: Features
features.statsDesc: Direct data from the Riot API. Compare 20+ metrics like CS, vision, and damage efficiency against your tier average to pinpoint strengths and areas for improvement.
features.chatQuestion1: How should I play this matchup?
features.chatDesc: Discuss specific match concerns with your AI Coach. Resolve questions through interactive conversation.

socialProof.label: Results
socialProof.title: Real Growth Players Have Experienced
socialProof.testimonial1: I realized my vision score was low. After focusing on it, I climbed from Gold to Plat in no time.
socialProof.testimonial2: Video analysis clearly showed my roaming mistakes. The improvement suggestions were specific and actionable.
socialProof.testimonial3: Checking CS data every game helped me increase my average CS by over 30.
socialProof.testimonial4: The jungle path optimization suggestions gave me much more confidence in my early gank decisions.
socialProof.testimonial5: The engage timing review was spot-on. Combined with ward placement improvements, it directly boosted our team's win rate.
socialProof.testimonial6: The specific CS accuracy feedback helped me consistently build gold leads every game.

pricingPage.fallbackNotice: Prices shown are approximate. Exact amounts will be confirmed at checkout.

faq.title: FAQ
faq.a1: Yes, you can cancel anytime. Premium features remain active until the end of your current billing period. After cancellation, you automatically continue as a Free member.
faq.a2: Yes, we offer a 7-day free trial for first-time users. You can try all Premium features during the trial period.
faq.a3: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade anytime. Plan changes are prorated, so you only pay the difference for the remaining period.
faq.q4: What are the benefits of the annual plan?
faq.a4: The annual plan offers up to 50% off compared to monthly billing. If you cancel mid-term, the remaining period will be refunded.
faq.a5: We accept credit cards (Visa, Mastercard, JCB, American Express). All payments are securely processed through Stripe.
faq.q6: What can I do as a Free member?
faq.a6: Free members can use AI analysis up to 3 times per week. Match history viewing and basic stats analysis through Riot API are available without limits.
faq.a7: Currently, the Japan (JP) server is supported. Support for other regions is planned for the future.
faq.q8: What's the difference between Premium and Extra?
faq.a8: Premium includes 20 AI analyses per week, 4 auto-selected segments, and AI coaching. Extra adds damage analysis, 5 segment selection, and unlimited AI analyses.
faq.q9: Will I be charged if I cancel during the trial?
faq.a9: No, if you cancel during the free trial period, you won't be charged at all. Simply cancel before the trial ends to avoid any charges.
faq.a10: Yes, you can pause your subscription for 1-3 months. You won't be charged during the pause period, and your subscription automatically resumes when the pause ends.
